id.value: [if(equals(parameters('computeModel'), 'Serverless'), resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers/databases', split(format('{0}/{1}', parameters('serverName'), parameters('name')), '/')[0], split(format('{0}/{1}', parameters('serverName'), parameters('name')), '/')[1]), resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers/databases', split(format('{0}/{1}', parameters('serverName'), parameters('name')), '/')[0], split(format('{0}/{1}', parameters('serverName'), parameters('name')), '/')[1]))]

[if(equals(parameters('computeModel'), 'Serverless'), resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers/databases', split(format('{0}/{1}', parameters('serverName'), parameters('name')), '/')[0], split(format('{0}/{1}', parameters('serverName'), parameters('name')), '/')[1]), resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers/databases', split(format('{0}/{1}', parameters('serverName'), parameters('name')), '/')[0], split(format('{0}/{1}', parameters('serverName'), parameters('name')), '/')[1]))]

connectionStrings.value: [union(parameters('productionConnectionStrings'), createObject('DefaultConnection', createObject('value', format('Server=tcp:{0},1433;Initial Catalog={1};Persist Security Info=False;User ID={2};Password={3};MultipleActiveResultSets=False;Encrypt=True;TrustServerCertificate=False;Connection Timeout=30;', reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Resources/deployments', 'sqlServer')).outputs.fullyQualifiedDomainName.value, reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Resources/deployments', 'sqlDatabase')).outputs.name.value, parameters('sqlAdministratorLogin'), parameters('sqlAdministratorPassword')), 'type', 'SQLAzure')))]

[union(parameters('stagingConnectionStrings'), createObject('DefaultConnection', createObject('value', format('Server=tcp:{0},1433;Initial Catalog={1};Persist Security Info=False;User ID={2};Password={3};MultipleActiveResultSets=False;Encrypt=True;TrustServerCertificate=False;Connection Timeout=30;', reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Resources/deployments', 'sqlServer')).outputs.fullyQualifiedDomainName.value, if(parameters('deployStagingDatabase'), reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Resources/deployments', 'stagingSqlDatabase')).outputs.name.value, reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Resources/deployments', 'sqlDatabase')).outputs.name.value), parameters('sqlAdministratorLogin'), parameters('sqlAdministratorPassword')), 'type', 'SQLAzure')))]

id.value: [resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites/slots', split(format('{0}/{1}', parameters('siteName'), parameters('slotName')), '/')[0], split(format('{0}/{1}', parameters('siteName'), parameters('slotName')), '/')[1])]

defaultHostname.value: [reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites/slots', split(format('{0}/{1}', parameters('siteName'), parameters('slotName')), '/')[0], split(format('{0}/{1}', parameters('siteName'), parameters('slotName')), '/')[1])).defaultHostName]

principalId.value: [reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites/slots', split(format('{0}/{1}', parameters('siteName'), parameters('slotName')), '/')[0], split(format('{0}/{1}', parameters('siteName'), parameters('slotName')), '/')[1]), '2022-09-01', 'full').identity.principalId]

properties.description: Alert when App Service plan CPU is high.
Alert when SQL database CPU is high.
